name: 1428 Vista Del Mar
title: Real-estate listing
summary: An interactive single-listing site for one home — a photo gallery with lightbox, key stats, a live mortgage estimator, floor plan, and a tour-request form.
setup_questions: What's the property address, list price, and beds/baths/square footage?
What are 4–6 standout features (e.g. "chef's kitchen, ocean-view primary suite, pool")?
Who's the listing agent — name, brokerage, phone, email?
Roughly what neighborhood/lifestyle should the copy lean into?
photo_terms: modern luxury home exterior dusk twilight
open concept living room large windows
sections: Hero with address, price, beds/baths/sqft and a hero photo
Photo gallery with click-to-open lightbox and thumbnails
Interactive mortgage payment estimator (price, down %, rate, term)
Schedule-a-tour form and agent contact card
Footer with disclaimer and MLS-style details
based_on: A dedicated single-property listing microsite of the kind agents spin up for premium homes (PhotoUp / CribFlyer style) — big gallery, key facts, floor plan, neighborhood, agent card, tour request.
